notes: H1 file root sib=1 universal precedent (round 04 §2.7 example block); parent=file root self-reference per HEADING-self-as-parent convention sustained 47 prior files.
H2 Ex1 at L3 first H2 in file → sib=1; parent=file root (NOT self-namespace §HO.1); h_lvl=2 byte-exact ## prefix.

source_line: In this example, a healthcare encounter CRF collects verbatim descriptions of the encounter.
notes: First SENTENCE under Ex1 — parent transitioned to §HO.1 sub-namespace per §2.5; SENTENCE sib_idx null per round 03 lock; verbatim ends with period byte-exact.
Bold-caption (file-name marker) — §R-D5 accept as SENTENCE (non-Note/Exception caption); not flagged as HEADING/NOTE; parent §HO.1 inherited from H2.

source_line: | 6 | ABC | HO | ABC123105 | HOSEQ | 2 | HONAM | Provider Name | ROOSEVELT HOSPITAL | CRF | |
notes: Last atom of Ex1 segment (suppho table final row) — parent still §HO.1 (next atom a036 at L55 boundary back to file-root); trailing empty cell `| |` byte-exact preserved.
Second H2 in file → sib=2 (continuation from sib=1 a002); parent=file root; H2 boundary clean transition Ex1 → Ex2.

source_line: In this example, the dates of an initial hospitalization are collected as well as the date/time of ICU stay. Subsequent to discharge from the initial hospitalization, follow-up healthcare encounters, including admission to a rehabilitation facility, visits with healthcare providers, and home nursing visits were collected. Repeat hospitalizations are categorized separately.
notes: First atom under Ex2 — parent transitioned to §HO.2; multi-sentence narrative kept as single atom (3 sentences in 1 source line) — Hook R22 sub-line carve-out N/A here (single line one atom).

source_line: | 1 | ABC | HO | ABC123101 | HOSEQ | 7 | HOINDC | Indication | STROKE | CRF | |
notes: Last atom of batch — atom_id a054 = expected (54 atoms total a001..a054 continuous); parent §HO.2; trailing empty cell preserved.

source_line_19: | Row | STUDYID | DOMAIN | USUBJID | HOSEQ | HOTERM | EPOCH | HOSTDTC | HOENDTC | HODUR |
notes: v1.9 standard 2-row TABLE_HEADER (line_end-line_start=1) per §R-D6; sib=null canonical for TABLE_HEADER; verbatim joined with literal \n preserves both header + alignment row byte-exact (10 columns); domains-bucket post-pilot scope so 1-row legacy not applicable.

source_line: | 2 | ABC | HO | ABC123101 | 2 | NURSING HOME | TREATMENT | | | P6D |
notes: Empty cells preservation — 3 distinct empty cell patterns: HOSTDTC empty `| |`, HOENDTC empty `| |`, trailing empty `|` after P6D content. Rule B byte-exact `| 2 | ABC | HO | ABC123101 | 2 | NURSING HOME | TREATMENT | | | P6D |` reproduced with no whitespace collapse, no cell merge.

source_line: **Rows 1-2:** Subject ABC123101 was hospitalized and then moved to a nursing home.
notes: §R-D5 bold-caption SENTENCE accept — caption `**Rows 1-2:**` is non-Note/Exception (`Rows` per §R-D5 explicit list); kept as part of single SENTENCE atom (caption + content), NOT split, NOT promoted to HEADING/NOTE; verbatim byte-exact incl. bold markers `**...**` and trailing period.
